game.title: Blowfish Hero
game.short_text: Float, fly, and blow away enemies in this unique puzzle platformer!

details.title: Blowfish Hero
details.description:
This game was made in ten days for the Lvl. 99 Game Jam with the theme of "Take a Deep Breath".
Play as Gale, the Blowfish Hero! Use his fantastical abilities to take deep breaths, float, propel himself through the air, and blow enemies away to overcome obstacles and solve puzzles! Explore a unique world in the ancient past with colorful and cute, sea-themed characters! Find the legendary Breathing Pearls, and bring the gift of Breath to your tribe and sister who yearn for a new home in a new land!
Controls:
MOVE: A,D / Left Arrow Key, Right Arrow Key
JUMP: W / Up Arrow Key / Space
INFLATE / DEFLATE: Shift
BLOW: Left Mouse Button
PAUSE: Esc / Enter

Made by Conjure Studios:
doremi115justiconce

Credits:
Music credits:
"Getting it Done" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com)

Downloading the Windows version is really recommended.

Web build does not work on MacOS, sorry!

game.title: Apnea
game.short_text: Adventure puzzle platform - 41st place at Lv. 99 Game Jam 2023

details.title: Apnea
details.description:
Apnea is a mysterious world that lies deep under the water of the ocean blue. A maze of shadowed caves and submerged tunnels, patrolled by powerful enemies. No one has ever dared these dangers ... until now. 
Take control of Mini, a brave diver with powerful lungs. He can inflate to fly high above obstacles or preserve breath to dive into the darkest depths. But you will need all your cunning to find your way through each level. 
Can you find your way through all the 15 levels and find the lost treasure of Apnea?
Apnea is a platform adventure with unique mechanics that will challenge all your powers and require every object at your disposal. To overcome the obstacles in Apnea, use your creativity - experiment with different strategies - and have fun!
Controls Note: If you play the browser version be aware that Ctrl + W or Ctrl + S are shortcuts used by the browser. It is recommended to use one of the Shift keys instead of the Ctrl keys to avoid pressing those combination by mistake while playing. 
Background original asset "Warped Caves" from: https://ansimuz.com/site/
Music "StreetLove": https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/audio/music/free-music-tracks-for-games-15...

game.short_text: A wingless story about bullies, disabilities and self acceptance.
game.title: Puffinick

details.title: Puffinick
details.description:
Puffinick - a wingless story is a puzzle-platformer game where you control a little bird called Puffinick which is unfortunately born without wings. Help him reach the peak of the mountain by taking a deep breath and use it as a jetpack. Swallow different objects and spit them in order to solve puzzles along the way! It's a story about bullies, disabilities and self acceptance.
Game made in 10 days for a game jam with the theme "Take a deep breath". Follow me on twitter if you like my game @hav24  

Controls
[ You need a mouse and keyboard to play this game ] - WASD to move and jump (or Arrow keys) - Right mouse click and hold to take a breath. - Aim at the bottom of your chatracter and Left mouse click to exhale and fly. - "R" to reset. 

Credits
Game made by Alessandro Pezzetti aka havana24 (solo developer). All assets were made by me. 8bit sound effects made with Bfxr and Freesound. Background music by Playonloop.com. Game made with Godot.

A game made by havana24.net Twitter @hav24

game.title: Starwind Shrine
game.short_text: A short puzzle game about blowing wind and fire.

details.title: Starwind Shrine
details.description:
CONTROLS
Escape
Pause
WASD or Arrow Keys
Move
Space
Press to jumpLeft MouseBreathe (and try holding it!)
Breathing allows you to push and pull objects in the world. You may even find it useful to hold your breath as long as possible!
STARWIND SHRINE
Starwind Shrine is a short and calm puzzle game about exploring a shrine.
You awaken at the door of a long-abandoned shrine. It seems vaguely familiar. You are Melanie, the ephemeral keeper of Starwind Shrine.Do you remember this place? Find a path through the grounds and light torches along the way!
Starwind Shrine is a physics-based puzzle game with a few clever tricks up its sleeve. It was submitted to the Level 99 Jam under the theme "Take a deep breath." It leans into the theme by allowing the player to use strong gusts of wind to push and pull pieces of the puzzle together as they traverse the shrine.
THE TEAM
rubic (@paradoxrevolver) — Team Lead, Creative Director, Programmer
ShyCryptid (@CryptidShy) — 3D Character Artist, 3D Animator
keestak (@keestak) — Music, Sound FX, Visual FX, Programmer
Camelot (@CameraCore) — Graphics Artist, UI Artist, Character Designer, Level Designer
Kavol (@RotaryCobra) — 3D Environment Artist, Texture Artist

game.title: Breath of Fury
game.short_text: Strategy-based brawler game made for LV.99 Gamejam

details.title: Breath of Fury
details.description:
Harness your inner strength and defend the sacred monastery against all odds!
Fight waves of enemies in a turn-based combat game where the key to victory lies in playing the right combo pieces. Use your breath to unleash devastating attacks, focus to strike enemies in multiple directions,  rage to power up your punches, and more...
Master the art of timing and positioning to make the most out of your combo pieces, and develop a winning strategy. After every victory, head to the shop to purchase potions to heal yourself or new skills to add to your repertoire. Choose wisely, as each skill has its own strengths and weaknesses and can either make or break your chances of success in the next battle.
Will you be able to withstand the relentless onslaught of your foes and come out on top?

Controls
Main input: Mouse (on-screen buttons)
Keyboard controls for player movement:
Left arrow / A - Move leftRight arrow / D - Move rightTab - Change facing direction

How to run the game?
You can either play the HTML5 version on top of this page, or download the Windows executable (recommended). 
To run the standalone version, download, unzip, and run the "Breath of Fury.exe".

Other
This game was made for the LV.99 game jam in 10 days.

Team members
Team Third Spirit
@murzy@swonqi@Samppamon

PS. If you want to see more from this team, check out our full game Arietta of SpiritsTo run the standalone version, download, unzip, and run the "Breath of Fury.exe".

game.title: Left Out
game.short_text: Find a way out of a crumbling ship infested with unknown life forms that have a taste for human flesh.

details.title: Left Out
details.description:
W-W-Where is everyone?
I'm hearing screams on the other side of the door...
I must escape this place!
Play as the last survivor of an abandoned spaceship drifting in space.
Stay calm and find your way out of the ship infested with unknown life forms.

-- Keyboard Commands --

Move - WASD

Aim - Mouse
FlashLight - R Click

Interact - F

Calm down - Space

View current objective - Tab

game.title: Crystal Horizon
game.short_text: High-speed adventure amidst the clouds of a distant planet

details.title: Crystal Horizon
details.description:
Game made in 8 days for Lv. 99 Game Jam 2023! Couldn't build to webgl because we're using FMOD.

You will navigate a treacherous gas giant planet, leaping across expansive chasms and dashing through high-speed obstacles with lightning-fast reflexes. Armed with a powerful bow and an unbreakable will, you must face off against deadly robotic enemies that seek to put an end to your journey. And with the added pressure of limited oxygen reserves, every move must be calculated and precise in order to survive.
Be sure to post your scores in the comments, top scores will be put here:

BEGINNING3.30 by RedlineARCHWAY5.43 by Redline-ARENAS8.57 by RedlineSPIRAL5.20 by RedlineROCKET JUMP9.32 by Redline-
Levels 3 and 7 are unavailable in the jam version due to a bug.

Controls:
WASD - movement
Space - jump
Left Mouse (click) - shoot shotgun
Left Mouse (hold) - shoot charged bow shot
Right Mouse - melee
C/Control - slide

Credits:

Arcy - Lead programmer, Sound design & Game design

Yollie - Programmer, Main artist & Game design

SlowBro - Music
Powered with FMOD Studio by Firelight Technologies Pty Ltd.

Additional Assets used: FlatKit, QuickOutline

game.title: Bunny99
game.short_text: Breathe deeply and slow down time to overcome impossible odds in this epic bunny vs machine showdown

details.title: Bunny99
details.description:
Controls: WASD/Arrows + Mouse
Made at Lv99Jam 2023

Design & Programming : Mauno Miikka Harjuntausta
Art : Kiri Kälkäjä
Music & SFX : ClockMaker ( https://tatataaaaa.com/clockmaker/ )
QA : James Bauman

You wake up in a trash pile, gasping for air. As you claw your way out you feel your heart pounding, ears rinning, skin burning.
There is something in the air. 
A strong metallic scent that tells you to run.

"You are not supposed to be alive."

Journey through a bleak and barren world as a bunny with an unexpected will to live. Battle against the machine that seeks to destroy you, using your mastery of slow motion through deep breaths to gain the upper hand in combat.

game.title: Stone Breath
game.short_text: Control explorer air stones, control breath to float in air, explore dangers & land safely, stunning graphics & music.

details.title: Stone Breath
details.description:
In this game, you control a fearless explorer character, in search of new adventures in a different world full of dangers. With the help of magical air stones, you can float freely through incredible scenarios, while controlling your breathing to stay in the air.
The gameplay mechanics are based on breathing, and you need to control your breathing to stay afloat, avoiding getting tired and fainting. When your air bar is running low, you will need to land in a safe spot to catch your breath before continuing the adventure.

Get ready to explore magical forests, floating temples, and other impressive locations. With incredible graphics and an exciting soundtrack, this adventure game is an unforgettable experience you can't miss.

moreInfo.Author: DragonBreathRebornStudios
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Pixel Art

resultData.title: Like a Fish out of Water

game.title: Like a Fish out of Water
game.short_text: Small haddock, big hamlet.

details.title: Like a Fish out of Water
details.description:
The humans have gone home for lunch. Time to go save your aquatic friends, but watch out for the seagulls!
Dodge and stun seagulls with your water beam. 
Break crates, barrels and carts to free the fish that have been caught.
Jump into puddles and take a deep breath to replenish your oxygen levels.
See if you can find all 30 fish on the map!

game.short_text: A game about cards and psychology.

details.title: Slice of Life (Open Your Eyes to Restart)
details.description:
This is a story-driven, short adventure game with deckbuilding and RPG elements created for the Lv. 99 Game Jam 2023.
The game can be played using only the mouse.

Our goal with this game is to explore the relationship between people's subconscious personality traits and their everyday behavior.

game.short_text: Breathe in the fire of determination, breathe out the ashes of doubt
game.title: Inspire

details.title: Inspire
details.description:
Take a deep breath, unleash your power, and inspire greatness in this adrenaline-fueled shooter. Inspired by the great athletes of World Aquatics, this game tries to recreate that feeling of taking a deep breath in the heat of action. With fast-paced gameplay, stunning visuals, and an immersive soundtrack, Inspire will take you on a pulse-pounding journey that will leave you breathless. 💨

WASD to moveMouse to aim (auto fire)Click and Hold to inhale (stops firing)Release when the meter is full to exhale (knockback enemies)
Avoid getting hitDefeated enemies drop orbsCollect orbs to grow strongerSurvive till the end.
💨🌬️🌫️🌊🏊‍♂️🧜‍♀️🐠🐋🍃🎐🎵🎶🎤🎼🎺🗣️
Made in 10 days for Lv. 99 Game Jam 2023Theme: Take A Deep Breath

If you like what you see, drop a comment below to let me know! If the game gets enough attention, I may add new items, enemies, and even bosses! 🎉 Thanks for playing!

game.title: Counting Ghosts
game.short_text: A short breathing-inspired puzzle game.

details.title: Counting Ghosts
details.description:
Breathe in, count the ghosts, breathe out...
Controls: Hold space to breathe in, release to breathe out. Left click and drag the wheels to adjust projectiles.
I feel that taking a deep breath is almost like forcefully blowing one's anxieties away. That idea eventually inspired the concept for this game.
Made for Lv. 99 Game Jam with the theme 'Take a deep breath'.

details.title: Bullet Pond
details.description:
Aren't you sick of all the storks trying to eat you, while you are just trying to enjoy a nice sunbath between the reeds? 

Finally having had enough, you decide to take a deep breath, grab your trusty revolver and take care of the Problem once and for all.
But down below you realize the stork has already prepared his minions to try to stop you. Battle your way trough the Pond, while making sure to never loose your breath. Suck up Air bubbles to stay alive, but beware! They don't last forever.

Can you make it to the end of the Pond and  chase the stork away?

Enjoy :-)

Credits:Game Design:Thaddeus OttLeon Holtmeier
Programming:Leon HoltmeierArt:Thaddeus OttSound/ Music:Merlin Ott

game.title: Âme Bleue
game.short_text: This young soul died too soon. Guide her back to the Land of the Living while she still has breathe.

details.title: Âme Bleue
details.description:
In Âme Bleue, you take on the role of a Guardian Angel, tasked with returning a lost soul back to her body on Earth before it is too late. But beware; evil forces lurk beyond the Gates of Paradise, seeking to blow out this soul's Eternal Flame. You must protect her at all costs!
Listen close, you can still hear her breathing... There is still time!

Controls :
Move:  WASD / ZQSD 
Shoot Arrow: Left Mouse Click
Pick Up / Drop Soul Flame: Space Bar

This game was released for the Lvl 99 game jam, with the theme : "Take a deep breath".


Credits:
Timo : Developer / Game Designer
Félix : Graphics Designer / Game Designer
Brian Francis Majewski (Musicka): Composer and Sound Designer

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.0 out of 5 stars(2 total ratings)

game.title: Puff Puff Payback
game.short_text: Puff up. Breath in objects. Payback your loans!

details.title: Puff Puff Payback
details.description:
Poof Poof... All your money's gone and you are stuck with enormous student loans!
Puff Puff... you need to pay them back.  Take a deep breath and swallow all kinds of stuff to complete tasks and get some money.
Will Puffy be free of debt again? Will the mail get delivered? Is the government spying on his uncle? Play the game and find out... or don't...
Created for Lv. 99 Game Jam 2023Theme: Take a deep breath
by FIRECHICK
Julian & Linda Treffler

Music from Karagumo BGM
SFX from soundsnap.com

moreInfo.Tags: Exploration, Funny, Pixel Art

game.title: [ENG] TICK: a deep breath
game.short_text: Breathshaping game

details.title: [ENG] TICK: a deep breath
details.description:
TICK: a deep breath
We made a little quest about a chick that can't fly, but can solve simple puzzles by inflating and deflating.
You can control the chick with the mouse, inflating and deflating like a balloon.

Our game has several endings, the ability to collect cards and chicks.

Everything you see in the game, including the sounds and music, are made from scratch by our team.

Team "Tick Team"

The development involved: 
igrok10 - game-design / concept art
Peregon - Programming
HoneyBoy - Animations
Kolijoker - art
AlekseiZlotnikov - Sounds and music

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 5.0 out of 5 stars(2 total ratings)

game.title: Frog Burgers
game.short_text: Making burgers is stressful work! Can you manage to keep up with the orders while keeping your breathing under control?

details.title: Frog Burgers
details.description:
Frog Burgers is an arcade pseudo-roguelike where you need to manage your breathing and keep your stress low to progress. Made for the LV.99 Game Jam 2023 in ten days! The theme was "Take a deep breath".
This was a bit of a challenge for me to make honestly. I'm glad I finished it at all. I originally wanted to have bosses show up on the Mondays, but I'm happy leaving it were it is now. Sorry about the plate bug, hopefully it isn't to bad for any of you. If you actually make through all 31 days*, please post a screen shot, I'd love to see it! Also if you beat my high score! Thank for playing!
KNOWN BUGS:
Sometimes plate ingredients overlap incorrectly.
*After day 30 there is an extra day, not on the calendar. This isn't an endless game, don't worry.
Sometimes burgers can start as "passible" instead of raw.
Some upgrades are offered more than once when they shouldn't be.(There are meant to be multiple upgrades with a "+0.5" or a "-1" in them, but not multiple upgrades of  ones with unique text i.e. Doubling score modifiers), selecting these after you've already picked one up will not do anything.
If any of you have ever worked the back of the house, I'm sorry for the ticket machine PTSD.

My Itch: NUTT3D
Engine: Gdevelop
Sounds: Made using Audacity, Freesound.org(CC0),JummBox2.5 by NUTT3D
Sprites: NUTT3D

moreInfo.Author: NUTT
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Casual, Cute, Frogs, gdevelop, Pixel Art, Roguelike, Singleplayer

game.title: Woolala Wowlala: Spell Caster
game.short_text: Voice-activated Co-op Monster Slaying Game

details.title: Woolala Wowlala: Spell Caster
details.description:
Voice-activated spell-casting game. Battle the Mighty Terror Bird and show who's the best wizard on the internet! Designed as a speed-running game, can you beat the bosses in under 20 seconds? I doubt so ... ... cause I can't yet.
The rule is simple, the longer (and more) you chant, the more powerful your spells will be. To get complete the level with three stars, you'll have to take a deep breath and cast an OHKO spell.

Made for the Lv. 99 Game Jam 2023 with the theme of Take a deep breath. Winner of the Innovation Award.
Why makes breathing an in-game mechanic when you can put it into real life? Break the fourth wall you say?
In this game, the longer and more your sing woolala-wowlala, the bigger and more damage your spells will be! Innovative eh?
Multiplayer Co-Op
Support up to 8 players in online co-op mode.  What's better than joining a Discord call and hearing everyone screaming and chanting woolala-wowlala?
Available Spells

Fireball (high-damage projectile)Ignorance (enemy debuffs; reduced armor)God Of Fire (player buffs; increased Fire Spells damage)Meteor Storm (self-targeting AOE, low damage)Slow Down (self-targeting, slow down the enemy)Poker Shield (player buffs; neutralize incoming damages)
Available Monsters

Giant Turtle (tutorial, armored + melee attack)Terror Bird (flying monster, triple fireballs + lighting aoe)The Feiwu of Nanshan (dodging monster + high damaging fire rings)

moreInfo.Author: fireredplays
moreInfo.Tags: Co-op, Dragons, Fantasy, Magic, Multiplayer, Singleplayer, voice-controlled, Wizards

resultData.title: Sir Bubbles and the valley of Pyotsyks

game.title: Sir Bubbles and the valley of Pyotsyks
game.short_text: Help Pyotsyks restore their home  in this risky adventure in a fairytale world full of perils.

details.title: Sir Bubbles and the valley of Pyotsyks
details.description:
About the game
			An adventure of Sir Bubbles - a hero-protector of the Valley of Pyotsyks. Use your bubble power to save your silly friends and transform the world.
			
		
	


	
		
			
			Game Plot
			Long ago the Valley of Pyotsyks that was just underneeth the home of Sir Bubbles was devastated by the Storm. When the storm was finally over. a strange green gas appeared as if from the underground. Everything the poison touched turned agressive and hostile.
			Everyhthing except Pyotsyks. In their chaotic play these small silly creatures somehow made everything bloom and flourish. In the days after the Storm they tried to rebuild what they could.  
			Sir Bubbles remembers those days. He helped pyotsyks by Inflating huge bubbles and creating Oases of Tranquility, where Pyotsyks lived ever since. And Bubbles became Sir Bubbles a Hero-Protector of the Valley of Pyotsyks.
			Sir Bubbles lived peacefully in his bubble home. His days of glory were behind him. Or so he thought...
			The winds are rising again and the new storm has hit the valley.
			Looks like it's time for Sir Bubbles to take the matter in his pipes again!
			
		
	


	
		
			
			Goal
 
			Restore all Oases by bringing Pyotsyks to their homes near lakes.
			
		
	


	
		
			
			Controls
 
			
				
					
						
						 RIGHT Mouse Button (hold or click)
						
						Move around
					
					
						 HOLD SPACE Button
						Spend Air to Inflate Bubble 
					
					
						 LEFT Mouse Button
						
						Launch the Bubble
						
					
				
			
			
		
	


	
		
			
			Toolset
			Unreal Engine 5.1.1 
			Blender 3.3
			Inkscape
			
		
	

 

	
		
			
			Credits
			Game Design, Modeling, Animation, VFX were created by me during the game jam.
			Special thanks to :
			
				My wife - Alona Dolnik, for her amazing voice acting, support and patience :)

				My friends: 

Denis Kupets for the amazing music composed on such a short notice and for allowing me to use it.
				Sasha Blazhenko for helping with testing in last minute.
			
			
		
	

 

	
		
			
			I hope you'll enjoy the game. Thanks for playing!

moreInfo.Author: Merekht
moreInfo.Tags: Cartoon, Short
